threats.title: WhatsApp Alerts 200 Users After Fake iOS App Installed Spyware; Italian Firm Faces Action
threats.summary: Meta-owned messaging platform WhatsApp said it alerted about 200 users who were tricked into installing a bogus version of its iOS app that was infected with spyware. According to reports from Italian newspaper La Repubblica and news agency ANSA, the vast majority of the targets are located in Italy.
